{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20755_1
|class_id=20755
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20755_2
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=33
|civ=17
|tech=11
|ss1=Snail DEF +10<br>Per Incense used, Snail HP +10<br>Incense Used: 40/40
|ss2=Snail DEF +20<br>Per Incense used, Snail HP +20<br>Incense Used: 40/40
|ss3=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 40/40
|ss4=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 40/40
|ss7=Snail DEF +30<br>Per Incense used, Snail HP +30<br>Incense Used: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
